name: Cypherflix Hub
description: Unified search, discover, requests, and calendar across Jellyseerr, Readarr, and any provider you wire up. Multi-provider replacement for the JF Enhanced Requests/Calendar tabs.
overview: Adds Discover / Requests / Calendar tabs to Jellyfin. Provider framework lets you plug in Jellyseerr, Readarr instances, and future services via the admin UI without code changes.
